statics.name: overridenFlags
statics.description: Tracks which flags have been overridden by mods.

statics.name: customFlags
statics.description: Flags that Codename couldn't recognize as its own defaults.

statics.name: addonFlags
statics.description: Flags from addon mods, keyed by mod name.

statics.name: CURRENT_API_VERSION
statics.description: The current API version of Codename Engine.

statics.name: MOD_DISCORD_CLIENT_ID
statics.description: The current mod's Discord client ID override.

statics.name: MOD_DISCORD_LOGO_KEY
statics.description: The current mod's Discord logo key override.

statics.name: MOD_DISCORD_LOGO_TEXT
statics.description: The current mod's Discord logo text override.

statics.name: MOD_REDIRECT_STATES
statics.description: State redirects defined by the current mod.

statics.name: SAVE_PATH
statics.description: The save file path. Defaults to CodenameEngine.

statics.name: SAVE_NAME
statics.description: The save file name. Defaults to save-default.

statics.name: WINDOW_TITLE_USE_MOD_NAME
statics.description: If true, the window title uses the mod name instead of the app name.

statics.name: TITLE
statics.description: The application title from project metadata.

statics.name: VERSION
statics.description: The application version from project metadata.

statics.name: VERSION_MESSAGE
statics.description: Formatted version string e.g. 'Codename Engine v1.0'.

statics.name: SOUND_EXT
statics.description: Preferred audio extension. ogg on desktop, mp3 on web.

statics.name: DEFAULT_DISCORD_LOGO_TEXT
statics.description: Default Discord large image tooltip text.

statics.name: BLACKLISTED_LANGUAGES
statics.description: Language IDs that are blacklisted from use.

statics.name: WHITELISTED_LANGUAGES
statics.description: If not empty, only these language IDs can be used.

statics.name: DEFAULT_COOP_ALLOWED
statics.description: Whether coop mode is allowed by default.

statics.name: DEFAULT_OPPONENT_MODE_ALLOWED
statics.description: Whether opponent mode is allowed by default.

statics.name: DEFAULT_NOTE_MS_LIMIT
statics.description: Maximum note ms offset before a note is ignored.

statics.name: DEFAULT_CAM_ZOOM_MULT
statics.description: Default camera zoom multiplier on beat.

statics.name: DEFAULT_HUD_ZOOM_MULT
statics.description: Default HUD zoom multiplier on beat.

statics.name: USE_CAM_ZOOM_MULT
statics.description: Whether camera zoom multiplier is used.

statics.name: USE_LEGACY_ZOOM_FACTOR
statics.description: Whether legacy zoom factor behavior is used.

statics.name: USE_LEGACY_TIMING
statics.description: Whether legacy timing behavior is used.

statics.name: SUSTAINS_AS_ONE_NOTE
statics.description: Whether sustain notes count as one note.

statics.name: DEFAULT_GITAROO
statics.description: Whether the Gitaroo easter egg is enabled.

statics.name: GITAROO_CHANCE
statics.description: Chance of triggering the Gitaroo easter egg.

statics.name: DEFAULT_MUTE_VOCALS_ON_MISS
statics.description: Whether vocals are muted on miss by default.

statics.name: DEFAULT_ICONBOP
statics.description: Whether health icons bop on beat by default.

statics.name: BOP_ICON_SCALE
statics.description: Scale applied to icons when bopping.

statics.name: PIXEL_ART_SCALE
statics.description: Scale used for pixel art stages.

statics.name: DEFAULT_STRUM_AMOUNT
statics.description: Default number of strums per strumline.

statics.name: USER_AGENT
statics.description: User-Agent string used in HTTP requests.

statics.name: DISABLE_WARNING_SCREEN
statics.description: If true, disables the warning screen.

statics.name: DISABLE_LANGUAGES
statics.description: If true, disables the language system.

statics.name: DEFAULT_GAMEOVER_SCRIPT
statics.description: Default game over substate script path.

statics.name: URL_WIKI
statics.description: URL to the Codename Engine wiki.

statics.name: URL_EDITOR_FALLBACK
statics.description: Fallback URL shown when editor docs are unavailable.

statics.name: URL_FNF_ITCH
statics.description: URL to the original FNF itch.io page.

statics.name: SONGS_LIST_MOD_MODE
statics.description: How mods affect the songs list. (prepend, override, append)

statics.name: WEEKS_LIST_MOD_MODE
statics.description: How mods affect the weeks list. (prepend, override, append)

statics.name: JSON_PRETTY_PRINT
statics.description: Indentation string used when pretty-printing JSON.

statics.name: UNDO_PREFIX
statics.description: Prefix added to undo history entries.

functions.name: loadFromData
functions.description: Parses an INI string and loads its values into the flags map.

functions.name: loadFromDatas
functions.description: Loads flags from multiple INI strings and calls loadPost.

functions.name: parseFlags
functions.description: Applies a parsed flags map to the Flags class fields.

functions.name: load
functions.description: Loads all flags from asset libraries, reading modpack INI files.
